title: Capability
description: A platform capability that modules can require. Capabilities are satisfied by tenant configuration (e.g. SMS connected, calendar connected).

supported_providers.description: Provider codes that can satisfy this capability.

setup_wizard_id.description: Reference to the setup wizard used when a module needs this capability and it is missing.

verification_checks.description: Runtime checks to confirm the capability is live (e.g. test send, webhook echo).
